text: As I stand at the threshold, looking through the glass into a vibrant, thoughtfully designed space, I am struck by a curiosity—a sense of anticipation that borders on excitement. Being here, surrounded by displays about research and development, I feel drawn into a world where possibilities are explored and new ideas are born. The sterile light, the bold display, and the lingering quiet of the corridor—all invite reflection and wonder. I feel a subtle sense of purpose, as if the environment wants to awaken my intellect, urging me to participate in the future unfolding here.
